Dockerfile.general_idea: Switch the base image from a Debian-based Maven/JDK 11 image to an Alpine-based Liberica JDK 21 image to align with the Java 21 migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application requires Java 21 runtime features and compatibility; the old JDK 11 image is incompatible with the target JDK version.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Replace Debian package manager (apt-get) with Alpine package manager (apk) for installing system dependencies like curl, bash, and maven.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The new base image is Alpine Linux, which does not support apt-get; using apt-get would result in a build failure.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Add Maven build step within the Dockerfile to compile and package the application during image build.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The previous image included Maven in the base image, but the new base image does not; explicit installation and execution of Maven is required to produce the JAR.
Dockerfile.after: RUN apk add maven ... RUN mvn -B -DskipTests -Pproduction -f /home/app/pom.xml clean package

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.3 to 3.3.4 to support Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6 APIs required for modern development.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project intends to utilize Java 21 features and ensure compilation against JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated Springfox Swagger dependencies with SpringDoc OpenAPI for API documentation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Springfox is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 / Spring Framework 6 due to package refactoring (jakarta.* vs javax.*).

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Cloud Gateway MVC dependency to version compatible with Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 3.0.1 is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 dependencies.
